schedule.name: Watts
schedule.content: You came into this world not by your own choice, and you will leave it not by your own choice. In between, you get to dance. The meaning is not found in what you accumulate or achieve. It's in the quality of your movement — the grace, the joy, the surrender with which you move through this brief and beautiful existence. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Borges
schedule.content: El tiempo es la sustancia de que estoy hecho. Es un río que me arrebata, pero yo soy el río. No tengo tiempo: soy tiempo. Esa es la única inmortalidad posible. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Krishnamurti
schedule.content: In the state of complete attention, there is no 'you' who is paying attention. There is only attention itself. And in that attention, all problems cease. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Thiel
schedule.content: Horizontal progress (1 to n) means copying. Vertical progress (0 to 1) means doing something new. Vertical is harder but the only path that matters. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Marco Aurelio
schedule.content: When you wake up in the morning, tell yourself: the people I deal with today will be meddling, ungrateful, arrogant, dishonest, and jealous. But I cannot be distracted. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Kahneman
schedule.content: Overconfidence is not a personality flaw. It is the natural byproduct of a mind that builds coherent stories from incomplete data. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Deutsch
schedule.content: The institution of scientific criticism — peer review, replication, open debate — is humanity's greatest invention. It's a machine for turning error into knowledge. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Kahneman
schedule.content: The availability heuristic: we judge the probability of events by how easily examples come to mind. News coverage distorts that. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Naval
schedule.content: Meditation trains you to observe your thoughts without reacting. That gap between stimulus and response contains all your freedom. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Epicteto
schedule.content: El estoicismo no es represión emocional. No se trata de no sentir. Se trata de no actuar desde el sentir sin pensar. Sentí todo. Decidí después. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Epicteto
schedule.content: La vida no es corta, la hacés corta. No te falta tiempo, lo derrochás. No necesitás más horas, necesitás mejor uso de las que tenés. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Watts
schedule.content: You don't think your way to meaning. You live your way into it. Meaning is not a concept you grasp — it's a quality that emerges when you're fully engaged in the act of being alive. Like tasting an orange. You can describe it, but you only know it by tasting. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Deutsch
schedule.content: The Enlightenment was the moment humanity crossed a threshold: the discovery that we can discover. Once you have the method of criticism, progress has no intrinsic ceiling. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Yudkowsky
schedule.content: Truthseeking is a skill you can train. Every time you catch yourself rationalizing instead of reasoning, you've leveled up. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Borges
schedule.content: La muerte es una costumbre que todos terminan por adquirir. Como fumar o leer el diario. La ironía del lenguaje convierte el horror en hábito, y esa conversión es la única forma de la dignidad. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Marco Aurelio
schedule.content: Very little is needed to make a happy life. It is all within yourself, in your way of thinking. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Graham
schedule.content: What you can't say today says more about our era than what we proudly declare. Find the ideas that make people uncomfortable and examine them. That's where progress lives. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Deutsch
schedule.content: Pessimism is not realism. It's a failure of imagination masked as sophistication. The real question is not whether progress is possible — it's whether we'll create the institutions it requires. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Deutsch
schedule.content: Our best theories are products of the imagination, not the senses. Popper saw that creativity comes first. Observation is merely the test, never the source. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Feynman
schedule.content: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns, so that each small piece of her fabric reveals the organization of the entire tapestry. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Borges
schedule.content: Funes lo recordaba todo: cada hoja de cada árbol, cada fragmento de cada día. No podía pensar. Pensar es olvidar diferencias, generalizar, abstraer. La memoria total es el fin del pensamiento. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Borges
schedule.content: El paraíso sería una biblioteca. Pero la Biblioteca de Babel es una cárcel. Mi cielo es un laberinto de libros donde nunca encontraré el que busco. El paraíso borgeano es trágico por definición. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Kahneman
schedule.content: What you see is all there is. System 1 constructs a coherent story from limited evidence and you rarely notice what is missing. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Marco Aurelio
schedule.content: Memento mori: remember that you will die. Not as a morbid thought, but as a compass. The shortness of life is what gives it meaning. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Feynman
schedule.content: I think it's much more interesting to live not knowing than to have answers which might be wrong. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Yudkowsky
schedule.content: The alignment problem: how do you build an AI that does what you want when it's smarter than you? Every proposed solution so far has a flaw. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Naval
schedule.content: Most people overestimate what they can do in a year and underestimate what they can do in a decade. Long-term thinking compounds beyond calculation. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Naval
schedule.content: Don't compete. Create. Competition is for people who can't build moats. Specific knowledge is a moat nobody can cross. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Epicteto
schedule.content: El rico que tiene miedo de perder su fortuna no es libre. El famoso que necesita aprobación no es libre. El político que necesita el poder no es libre. La libertad es no necesitar. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Feynman
schedule.content: It doesn't matter how beautiful your theory is, it doesn't matter how smart you are. If it doesn't agree with experiment, it's wrong. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Watts
schedule.content: The idea that you are a lonely individual adrift in an indifferent universe is a hallucination. You are not in the universe. You are the universe. As the ocean 'oceans' in waves, the universe 'universes' in you. There is no separation — only the appearance of it. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Taleb
schedule.content: You can't predict the future. But you can position yourself so that surprises benefit you. That's antifragility. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Deutsch
schedule.content: Historicism — the idea that history follows inevitable laws — is false. There are no laws of historical development. The future is shaped by ideas we haven't yet created. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Thiel
schedule.content: Indefinite optimism is a trap: believing the future will be great but having no idea how to make it so. You need a definite plan. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Thiel
schedule.content: The most underrated startup advantage: a small market that no one else thinks is interesting. If everyone overlooks you, you can dominate quietly. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Watts
schedule.content: The fear of death is just the fear of losing the ego — the mask you've been wearing. But the mask was never your face. When the mask falls away, what remains is not nothing. What remains is everything. You are the universe pretending to be a person. The person ends. The universe doesn't. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Borges
schedule.content: La muerte y la brújula: el detective Lönnrot construyó una teoría perfecta que lo llevó exactamente a la trampa. El conocimiento no es una escalera: es un laberinto que termina en tu propia muerte. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Feynman
schedule.content: I was born not knowing and have had only a little time to change that here and there. #PanteonBook

schedule.name: Marco Aurelio
schedule.content: The cucumber is bitter? Throw it away. There are thorns on the path? Step around them. That's all you need to do. Don't ask 'why do such things exist?' #PanteonBook
